AP Coastal Belt Coverage

Crasenim Pharma: Serving Andhra Pradesh from Srikakulam to Vijayawada

Headquartered in Vizianagaram, Crasenim Pharma serves the entire AP coastal belt with WHO GMP certified medicines, pharma career opportunities, PCD franchise partnerships, and bulk medicine supply across all major districts from Srikakulam in the north to Vijayawada in the south.

📍 Srikakulam 📍 Vizianagaram (HQ) 📍 Visakhapatnam 📍 Anakapalli 📍 Kakinada 📍 Rajahmundry 📍 Eluru 📍 Vijayawada
View Pharma Jobs Franchise Opportunity
Coverage Map

Districts We Serve Along the AP Coastal Belt

We have active operations — MR vacancies, franchise territories, and bulk supply — across every major district from Srikakulam to Vijayawada.

North Coastal AP

Srikakulam District

AP's northernmost coastal district with a growing rural and semi-urban healthcare network. Key market towns include Srikakulam, Narasannapeta, Palasa, Amadalavalasa, and Ichapuram. Strong potential for MR field sales and first-time franchise partners.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Orders
Headquarters District

Vizianagaram District

Crasenim Pharma's home district. Strong brand recognition and established doctor relationships. Ongoing MR vacancies in Bobbili, Parvathipuram, Salur, and Nellimarla sub-territories. Additional franchise slots available in less-penetrated sub-areas.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Orders
Major Metro

Visakhapatnam District

Largest metro on the AP coast. High-volume pharmaceutical market with corporate hospitals, medical colleges, and a dense specialist network. Ideal for experienced Senior MRs targeting cardiologists, diabetologists, and gastroenterologists.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Supply
Industrial Zone

Anakapalli District

Fast-growing industrial satellite district adjacent to Visakhapatnam. Expanding healthcare facilities driven by the large industrial workforce. An emerging opportunity for pharma franchise partners looking for a growing, less-competitive territory.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Orders
Port City

Kakinada District

Active port city with a well-developed pharmaceutical distribution network. Medical college hospitals and a large specialist base drive strong prescription volumes. Excellent territory for experienced MRs and established pharma distributors seeking franchise rights.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Orders
Delta Region

Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Konaseema

Fertile delta district with a dispersed but loyal medical community. Amalapuram serves as the commercial and healthcare hub. An underserved pharma market with significant growth potential — ideal for dedicated franchise partners willing to build a long-term base.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Orders
East Godavari

Rajahmundry / East Godavari

Rajahmundry is a major commercial city on the Godavari river with a large general practitioner and specialist base. High private hospital density creates strong prescription volumes for antibiotics, cardiac, and gastric categories — a proven territory for experienced MRs.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Orders
West Godavari

Eluru & West Godavari

Eluru is the district headquarters with consistent pharmaceutical demand. Bhimavaram, Tanuku, Narsapur, and Palacole are important sub-markets. Well connected by road and rail. Steady prescription volumes with growing healthcare utilization across the district.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Orders
NTR District

NTR District

Named after the legendary leader, NTR District covers rural and semi-urban areas around Vijayawada. Tiruvuru and Jagannadhapuram are key market points with growing clinic infrastructure. A developing territory well-suited to motivated MRs building their career in AP pharma.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Orders
Commercial Capital

Vijayawada & Krishna District

Vijayawada is AP's commercial capital with the highest prescription density in the coastal belt. Major hospitals, medical colleges, and a dense chain-pharmacy network. Ideal for experienced Senior MRs and ASMs with existing doctor relationships in internal medicine, cardiology, and endocrinology.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Orders
West Godavari

Bhimavaram & Narsapur

Bhimavaram is one of the busiest pharmaceutical markets in West Godavari with strong general practice and specialist networks. Narsapur and Tanuku complement the market. Commission-based MR and franchise slots are actively available in this territory.

MR Jobs Franchise Bulk Orders
Three Ways to Connect

What Crasenim Pharma Offers in Your District

Whether you want a pharma career, a business opportunity, or a reliable medicine supplier — we have the right option for every district in the AP coastal belt.

Pharma Careers

Medical Representative Jobs

We hire experienced MRs and commission-based field sales professionals across all AP coastal districts. Full-time, permanent roles with competitive CTC and performance incentives.

Business Opportunity

PCD Franchise & Commission MR

Take exclusive franchise rights for your district or work as a commission-based MR promoting our WHO GMP certified brands. Low investment, high-margin opportunity across AP.

Wholesale Supply

Bulk Medicine Orders

Hospitals, pharmacies, and distributors across AP can order our full product range in bulk with competitive pricing, quality documentation, and pan-India delivery.

Market Insight

Why the AP Coastal Belt is a Priority Market

The Andhra Pradesh coastal belt stretching from Srikakulam to Vijayawada is one of India's most densely populated coastal corridors, home to over 30 million people across 11 districts. The region's strong agricultural economy, rising urban middle class, and expanding healthcare infrastructure create a consistently growing pharmaceutical market.

Key demand drivers include a high prevalence of lifestyle diseases — hypertension, type 2 diabetes, and GERD — across both urban centres like Visakhapatnam and Vijayawada, and semi-urban markets like Kakinada, Rajahmundry, and Eluru. These are the exact therapeutic categories covered by Crasenim Pharma's product portfolio.

With WHO GMP certification and manufacturing through AKUMS DRUGS, Crasenim Pharma is positioned to serve this market with products that doctors prescribe with confidence and patients can afford.

  • 11 districts covered from Srikakulam to Vijayawada
  • Products aligned to the region's top disease burden (diabetes, hypertension, infections, GERD)
  • Strong brand acceptance among GPs and specialists in Vizianagaram & Visakhapatnam
  • Growing prescription market in tier-2 cities like Kakinada, Rajahmundry, and Eluru
  • Untapped franchise potential in Konaseema, NTR District, and Anakapalli
  • Fast-growing private hospital segment in Vijayawada and Visakhapatnam
  • Active bulk medicine demand from government hospitals and district HQ facilities
FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

Does Crasenim Pharma operate in Visakhapatnam?
Yes. We have active Medical Representative vacancies, PCD franchise territories, and bulk medicine supply in Visakhapatnam and the adjacent Anakapalli district. View MR jobs in Visakhapatnam →
Are there commission-based MR jobs available near Vijayawada?
Yes. We offer both full-time MR positions and commission-based field sales roles in Vijayawada and NTR District. See openings in Vijayawada →
Can I start a PCD pharma franchise in Srikakulam?
Yes. Franchise territories are available in Srikakulam and surrounding sub-districts. We provide exclusive monopoly rights, promotional materials, and full product training. Learn about Srikakulam franchise →
Does Crasenim Pharma supply bulk medicines to hospitals in Kakinada?
Yes. We supply WHO GMP certified medicines in bulk to hospitals, nursing homes, and pharmacies in Kakinada and across East Godavari. Request bulk pricing →
Is there a pharma franchise opportunity in Eluru or Rajahmundry?
Yes. Franchise territories are available in Eluru, Bhimavaram, and the broader Rajahmundry–East Godavari market. Contact our franchise team via WhatsApp for current availability in your specific sub-district.
How do I contact Crasenim Pharma for a specific district inquiry?
Call or WhatsApp us at +91 99890 74806 or email crasenimpharma@gmail.com. You can also fill in the enquiry forms on the Careers, Franchise, or Bulk Orders pages.

Find Your Opportunity in Andhra Pradesh

Whether you're looking for a pharma career, a franchise business, or a reliable medicine supplier — Crasenim Pharma has the right partnership for you in your district.
